meta.note: Compiled from known business data. Addresses and operational status should be verified before outreach. Some businesses may have closed or relocated since data was collected.

neighborhoods.name: Upper West Side (UWS)
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Affluent families, health-conscious professionals, strong organic/natural food culture. Home to many independent grocers.

targets.fit_rationale: Iconic NYC grocery known for specialty and gourmet products. High foot traffic, affluent customer base that seeks premium pantry items like artisanal bone broth.
Legendary NYC gourmet food institution since 1934. Curates specialty food products and has a devoted, affluent customer base that values quality artisanal products.
Upscale gourmet market specializing in fresh, high-quality foods. Carries premium prepared foods and specialty grocery items. Ideal customer for artisanal broth.

targets.neighborhood: Upper West Side / Midtown West border
targets.fit_rationale: Long-standing independent natural foods store. Carries organic, specialty, and health-focused products. Strong alignment with bone broth's health positioning.
High-traffic specialty grocery. While a chain, individual locations sometimes carry local products and the customer base is ideal for bone broth.
Flagship Whole Foods location with dedicated local vendor programs. Strong organic/natural food focus. Premium price tolerance among shoppers.
Local health food store focusing on supplements, organic products, and specialty health foods. Direct alignment with bone broth as a wellness product.
Premium cold-pressed juice chain with strong wellness positioning. Already carries broth products in some locations. Natural retail partner for bone broth.
Health-focused cafe with organic, plant-forward menu. While plant-based focused, their health-conscious clientele overlaps with bone broth consumers.
Popular neighborhood grocery with a strong prepared foods and specialty section. Services the affluent UWS residential community.
Iconic bakery with massive foot traffic. While primarily baked goods, a premium broth product could complement their offerings as a savory pairing.
Beloved neighborhood institution with devoted local following. High volume, could add bone broth as a grab-and-go wellness offering.
Yoga studio with retail section. Health-conscious clientele post-class are ideal for grab-and-go bone broth products.
Supplement and health products retailer. Bone broth fits within their collagen, protein, and gut health product categories.
Daniel Boulud's gourmet market and cafe. Premium positioning, curated specialty foods, affluent clientele near Lincoln Center.

neighborhoods.name: Upper East Side (UES)
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Wealthiest residential neighborhood in NYC. Old money and new affluent families. Strong demand for premium, health-oriented food products.

targets.fit_rationale: Iconic UES gourmet market by Eli Zabar. Premium artisanal foods, prepared foods counter. Affluent clientele who pay premium for quality. Perfect bone broth placement.
Another Eli Zabar venue with specialty grocery, rooftop greenhouse, and prepared foods. Curates artisanal products for discerning UES shoppers.
Upscale Italian-inspired gourmet grocery. Strong prepared foods, specialty products, and premium pantry items. Affluent customer base.
Classic UES gourmet market serving the neighborhood since 1915. Premium prepared foods, specialty grocery. Ideal for artisanal bone broth.
Premium gourmet food market with focus on quality meats, seafood, and specialty products. Natural fit for artisanal bone broth near prepared foods section.
Upscale neighborhood grocery with curated specialty items, prepared foods, and gourmet pantry section. Family-owned, supports artisanal brands.
Major organic grocer with local vendor programs. UES location serves affluent customers willing to pay premium for quality health foods.
Historic German-style butcher shop since 1937. Carries specialty meat products and broths. Natural cross-sell for artisanal bone broth.
Ultra-premium butcher shop on Madison Ave. Clientele buys the finest meats and would appreciate premium bone broth as a complementary product.
Premium juice and wellness beverage chain. Already positions broth-like products. Strong alignment with bone broth as a wellness sip.
Neighborhood juice bar with smoothies and wellness drinks. Bone broth adds a savory, protein-rich option to their wellness beverage lineup.
Health food and supplement store. Carries specialty health products. Bone broth fits their collagen, gut health, and clean protein positioning.
Iconic health-conscious restaurant/cafe. While plant-based, their customer base is highly health-conscious and overlaps with bone broth demographics.
Neighborhood specialty grocery serving UES residents. Curated selection of premium products and prepared foods.
Boutique fitness studio with affluent female clientele. Post-workout retail section is ideal for grab-and-go bone broth products.
Premium cycling studio with retail area. Health-focused clientele who invest in wellness products post-workout.

neighborhoods.name: West Village
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: One of NYC's most desirable neighborhoods. Mix of creative professionals, affluent residents, and strong food/wellness culture. Extremely high concentration of independent food businesses.

targets.fit_rationale: Iconic artisanal cheese shop on Bleecker. Carries curated specialty food products. Customers appreciate artisanal quality and are willing to pay premium.
Family-run butcher shop since 1900. Carries specialty meat products. Bone broth is a natural pairing with their premium meats.
While primarily chocolates, this historic shop represents the artisanal food culture of the village and its foot traffic brings ideal customers.
Large independent natural foods store with extensive supplement, organic grocery, and specialty health food selection. Prime placement for bone broth.
Trendy plant-based cafe and juice bar. Despite plant focus, their wellness-oriented customers are key bone broth demographics.
Premium wellness juice bar. Multiple Village locations. Bone broth fits their warm wellness beverage category.
Popular neighborhood cafe with devoted following. Health-conscious menu with Mediterranean influence. Bone broth could work as a menu addition or retail item.
British specialty food shop with curated imported and specialty products. Niche but devoted clientele who appreciate artisanal quality.
Organic and raw food retailer focused on wellness products. Direct alignment with bone broth's health and wellness positioning.
Historic specialty coffee and tea shop since 1907. While focused on beverages, their artisanal food culture customer base overlaps with bone broth buyers.
Italian restaurant with retail section. Farm-to-table ethos aligns with artisanal bone broth's quality positioning.
Neighborhood deli that carries specialty products alongside standard fare. Opportunity for impulse bone broth purchases.

neighborhoods.name: East Village
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Creative, health-conscious, younger demographic. Dense concentration of juice bars, wellness shops, and independent food businesses. Strong vegan/health food culture.

targets.fit_rationale: Independent natural foods market with a strong selection of organic, specialty, and health-focused products. Ideal channel for bone broth.
Small organic grocery focused on clean, natural products. Perfect fit for artisanal bone broth in their curated selection.
One of NYC's original juice bars. Strong wellness brand. Bone broth fits as a warm, protein-rich wellness beverage option.
Premium cold-pressed juice location. Wellness-focused clientele. Bone broth complements their health beverage lineup.

targets.neighborhood: East Village / Lower East Side border
targets.fit_rationale: Plant-based deli and grocery. While vegan-focused, their health-conscious customer base includes many who also consume bone broth.
Indian spice and specialty grocery. While niche, their customers cook from scratch and value quality ingredients including broths.
Acclaimed vegetable-forward restaurant. Food-savvy clientele who appreciate artisanal products.
Beloved independent coffee shop. Opportunities for bone broth as an alternative warm beverage on their menu.
Japanese specialty grocery. Japanese bone broth (dashi/tonkotsu) tradition creates natural customer interest in premium bone broth.
Neighborhood grocery with strong produce and specialty items. Located in the heart of the East Village's food-conscious community.
Major yoga center with retail area and cafe. Post-practice customers are ideal bone broth consumers seeking protein and collagen recovery.
Neighborhood cheese and specialty grocery. Curated artisanal products appeal to their food-savvy customer base.

neighborhoods.name: Greenwich Village
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Historic cultural neighborhood. NYU area brings young, health-conscious consumers. Strong independent food business culture.

targets.fit_rationale: Largest independent natural food store in the Village. Extensive health food, supplement, and organic grocery selection. Prime bone broth placement.
America's oldest apothecary (1838). While primarily pharmacy/beauty, carries wellness and health products. Bone broth's collagen benefits align.
Extension of Murray's Cheese shop. Artisanal food culture, curated specialty products, food-savvy customers.
Historic Italian butcher and specialty shop on Bleecker. Traditional customers who value quality ingredients, including homestyle broth.
While primarily a pizzeria, this iconic Village institution has massive foot traffic. Potential for grab-and-go broth display.
Popular independent coffee shop near NYU. Socially conscious brand that could feature bone broth as a healthy warm alternative.
Health supplement retailer. Bone broth powders and concentrates fit within their protein, collagen, and gut health categories.
Yoga-community-run natural foods store. Strong focus on health, wellness, and clean eating. Perfect alignment with bone broth values.

neighborhoods.name: SoHo
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Premier shopping destination. Mix of high-end retail, wellness flagships, and affluent shoppers/tourists. Strong wellness and beauty culture.

targets.fit_rationale: Iconic gourmet food market (verify current operational status). If open, perfect premium placement for artisanal bone broth.

targets.address: 95 E Houston St, New York, NY 10012
targets.fit_rationale: Large Whole Foods with local vendor program. High traffic SoHo location, affluent and health-conscious shoppers.
Trendy plant-based juice bar and cafe. Despite plant focus, wellness-oriented clientele are key bone broth demographics.
Premium wellness juice bar in prime SoHo location. High foot traffic, affluent health-conscious customers.
High-end natural beauty and wellness shop. Carries ingestible wellness products. Bone broth's collagen benefits align with their beauty-from-within philosophy.
Specialty grocery known for quality produce, specialty items, and prepared foods. SoHo location serves affluent neighborhood residents.
Artisanal chocolate and gourmet shop. Represents SoHo's premium food culture. Customers appreciate handcrafted, artisanal products.
Meal prep and healthy prepared food shop. Bone broth is a natural add-on for their health-conscious meal prep customers.
Popular cafe with health-conscious menu and grab-and-go counter. Premium positioning, trendy clientele.
Yoga studio serving the SoHo wellness community. Post-class retail opportunity for bone broth.

neighborhoods.name: NoHo
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Small but affluent neighborhood between East Village and SoHo. Boutique food shops, upscale dining, creative professionals.

targets.address: 95 E Houston St, New York, NY 10012
targets.fit_rationale: Major organic grocer at the intersection of NoHo and SoHo. Local vendor programs support artisanal products like bone broth.
Hip, health-conscious cafe. Bond St location attracts creative professionals who value quality, wellness-oriented food options.

targets.address: 53 Great Jones St, New York, NY 10012
targets.fit_rationale: Artisanal Italian market and restaurant. Carries curated specialty products, house-made pantry items. Premium quality alignment.
Artisanal food producer/retailer. Represents NoHo's small-batch artisanal food culture.
While primarily wines/spirits, adjacent to the food-conscious NoHo community. Partnerships possible for food-pairing events.

neighborhoods.name: TriBeCa
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Among the wealthiest zip codes in America. Family-oriented affluent residents. Premium grocery and food culture. Celebrity residents.

targets.fit_rationale: Premium Whole Foods location serving TriBeCa's wealthy families. Local vendor program, high price tolerance, health-focused shoppers.
Popular gourmet deli/bagel shop with strong neighborhood following. Bone broth could complement their menu as a soup/sip option.
Hugh Jackman's coffee shop. Premium positioning, socially conscious brand, celebrity association draws health-conscious TriBeCa crowd.
Neighborhood gourmet food shop. Serves TriBeCa's affluent residents who seek premium artisanal products.
Historic TriBeCa nut and specialty food purveyor. Artisanal positioning, affluent neighborhood clientele.
Italian prepared food shop. Quality-focused, grab-and-go format. Bone broth works as a soup/sipping option.
Premium Japanese knife and kitchenware store. While not food retail, their serious home cook customer base is ideal for bone broth cross-promotion.
Premium juice bar in family-heavy TriBeCa. Post-workout and wellness-sip positioning for bone broth.
Children's activity center with parent waiting areas. Health-conscious TriBeCa parents are ideal customers for nutritious bone broth.

neighborhoods.name: NoLita
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Trendy, fashion-forward neighborhood. Strong cafe culture, boutique retail, health-conscious young professionals.

targets.fit_rationale: Instagram-famous juice bar/cafe. Strong wellness brand. Trendsetting NoLita location, health-conscious clientele.
Iconic NoLita cafe with fashion-forward, health-conscious clientele. Premium positioning. Bone broth fits as a wellness menu item.
While a pizza shop, massive foot traffic and neighborhood landmark status means high visibility for any partnered product.
Popular grab-and-go spot. Health-conscious NoLita clientele. Bone broth could work as a warm soup/sip offering.
Premium wellness juice bar. NoLita location serves trendy, health-focused customers seeking premium wellness beverages.
Premium fragrance/wellness brand. While not food retail, represents the affluent wellness customer profile in NoLita.
Beloved neighborhood specialty food shop. High foot traffic, artisanal quality positioning.

neighborhoods.name: Lower East Side
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Rapidly gentrifying neighborhood. Emerging wellness and food scene. Mix of old-school delis and new health-conscious businesses.

targets.fit_rationale: Historic indoor market with multiple specialty food vendors. Relocated to modern facility. Multiple vendor opportunities for bone broth placement.

targets.address: 179 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002
targets.fit_rationale: Legendary appetizing shop since 1914. Premium specialty foods, devoted customer base. Artisanal bone broth fits their quality positioning.
While candy-focused, this iconic LES shop represents the neighborhood's specialty food retail culture and massive foot traffic.
Vegan deli and grocery. Despite plant-based focus, their health-conscious clientele overlaps with bone broth demographics.
Health-forward cafe with strong following. Known for wellness-oriented menu items. Bone broth fits their clean eating philosophy.
Offshoot of Dimes cafe. Curated health-focused grocery and grab-and-go items. Perfect bone broth retail channel.

targets.address: 205 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002
targets.fit_rationale: Iconic NYC deli since 1888. While traditional, massive foot traffic and brand cachet. Bone broth could complement their retail/soup offerings.
Artisanal vendor within Essex Market. Represents the market's curated specialty food culture.
Premium wellness juice bar. Health-focused clientele seeking clean, premium wellness beverages.

neighborhoods.name: Chelsea
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Health-conscious professionals, strong fitness culture. Chelsea Market is a major food destination. Gallery district brings affluent visitors.

targets.fit_rationale: Iconic indoor food market with multiple vendors. Massive foot traffic from tourists and locals. Multiple vendor placement opportunities for bone broth.
Premium seafood market within Chelsea Market. Carries specialty food products. Customer base appreciates quality artisanal foods.
Farm-to-table butcher shop in Chelsea Market. Pasture-raised meats, already makes bone broth in-house. Could carry Rooted Broth as a retail partner.
Premium wellness juice chain. Chelsea location serves the neighborhood's strong fitness and wellness community.
Farm-to-table specialty grocer focusing on local, sustainable, artisanal products. Perfect alignment with artisanal bone broth positioning.
Health food and supplement store. Bone broth fits within their collagen, protein, and gut health product categories.
Popular specialty grocery with health-conscious customer base. While a chain, the Chelsea location serves a prime demographic.
Health supplement retailer. Chelsea's fitness-focused population drives demand for protein and recovery products like bone broth.
Trendy yoga studio with retail component. Post-practice customers are ideal for grab-and-go bone broth products.
Health-focused prepared food vendor. Their customer base seeks nutritious, quality food products.

neighborhoods.name: Flatiron / Union Square
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Major food destination. Union Square Greenmarket, Eataly, Whole Foods. Dense concentration of health-conscious professionals and foodies.

targets.fit_rationale: Massive Italian food hall and market. Carries premium specialty food products. High foot traffic, food-savvy customers. Bone broth fits their artisanal ethos.

targets.address: 4 Union Square South, New York, NY 10003
targets.fit_rationale: Flagship Union Square Whole Foods. Local vendor program, massive foot traffic, health-conscious shoppers. Prime bone broth placement.
One of the busiest Trader Joe's in NYC. Enormous foot traffic, health-conscious customer base.
NYC's premier farmers market. Farm-to-table ethos perfectly aligns with artisanal bone broth. Direct-to-consumer sales opportunity.
Premium wellness juice chain. Flatiron location serves health-conscious professionals in the area.
Upscale home and wellness retailer with curated food and wellness products. Premium positioning aligns with artisanal bone broth.
Health-focused tea and vegan cafe. While plant-based, their wellness customer base overlaps with bone broth consumers.
Independent gourmet grocery with curated specialty food selection. Serves Flatiron's affluent professional community.
Health supplement retailer near Union Square. Bone broth fits collagen, protein, and gut health categories.
Premium fitness studio with retail area. Health-focused clientele seeking post-workout recovery products like bone broth.

neighborhoods.name: Gramercy
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Affluent, quiet residential neighborhood. Gramercy Park exclusivity. Smaller food retail scene but quality-focused.

targets.business_name: Gramercy Park Flower Shop / Todaro Bros.
targets.fit_rationale: Italian specialty food store with decades of history. Carries premium imported and artisanal products. Loyal neighborhood clientele.
Health-focused fast-casual chain. Clean eating menu aligns with bone broth as a add-on soup/sip option.
Premium wellness juice bar. Affluent Gramercy residents are ideal bone broth customers.
Boutique fitness studio. Affluent, fitness-focused female clientele. Post-class retail opportunity for bone broth.
While wine-focused, represents affluent Gramercy spending patterns. Potential for specialty food cross-promotion.

neighborhoods.name: Murray Hill
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Younger professionals, growing food scene. Some specialty food retail. More price-conscious than UES/UWS but health-aware.

targets.fit_rationale: Legendary specialty food emporium. Carries thousands of specialty products from around the world. Food-savvy customers who appreciate unique artisanal products.
Popular specialty grocery with health-conscious younger professional customer base.
Korean-inspired vegan and tea cafe. Health-conscious clientele, wellness positioning, premium tea and food experience.
Health supplement retailer. Younger professional Murray Hill residents seeking protein and recovery supplements.
Premium wellness juice bar. Health-focused younger professionals in Murray Hill.
Long-standing Italian specialty food store. Premium meats, cheeses, and specialty pantry items. Bone broth fits their artisanal product lineup.

neighborhoods.name: Midtown West / Hell's Kitchen
neighborhoods.demographic_notes: Dense food scene especially along 9th Avenue. Theater district brings high foot traffic. Mix of residential professionals and tourist traffic.

targets.fit_rationale: Columbus Circle flagship location. Massive foot traffic from residents, office workers, and tourists. Local vendor programs.
Upscale food hall with multiple specialty vendors. Growing Hell's Kitchen food destination. Multiple vendor placement opportunities.
Long-standing independent natural foods store. Organic, specialty, and health products. Strong alignment with bone broth positioning.
9th Avenue specialty grocery. Eclectic selection of international and specialty products. Food-savvy Hell's Kitchen residents.
Fresh fish and specialty food market on 9th Avenue. Quality-focused customers who cook at home and value premium ingredients.
Specialty grocery known for fresh, quality products. Hell's Kitchen location serves residential community of food-conscious professionals.
Premium wellness juice bar. Midtown location serves health-conscious office workers and residents.
Acclaimed artisanal bakery. Quality-focused food customers who appreciate handcrafted products.
Specialty cheese and gourmet food on the 9th Avenue food corridor. Customers appreciate curated artisanal products.
Historic Greek bakery on 9th Avenue. Represents the neighborhood's artisanal food heritage and devoted local following.
Health supplement retailer. Hell's Kitchen fitness community drives demand for protein and wellness supplements.
